summary: DHH gives a brief status update on an intense academic deadline. He and his collaborators need to produce a hundred-page document by Thursday noon, with eleven copies required. Between printing logistics, a teammate's girlfriend's birthday, and a major rewrite of the computer science section, they're feeling enormous time pressure. This explains his recent silence on the blog.
key_points: Facing a Thursday deadline to deliver a hundred-page academic paper in eleven copies
A significant 30-page rewrite of the computer science section adds to the pressure
Real-life obligations like a birthday compete with the deadline for time
The pressure explains his lack of recent blog posts
money_quotes: A hundred pages by Thursday at 1200 hours.
Just doing the printing is a half-day job.
We're starting to feel the heat of a fire-breathing deadline.
key_insight: A brief, personal update from DHH's student days showing the crunch of academic deadlines crowding out everything else, including blogging.
